mapper.insert: insert into document_attachments (document_attachment_id, company_id, document_id, file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size_bytes, media_kind, status, uploaded_by, uploaded_at) values (#{documentAttachmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSizeBytes,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{mediaKind,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uploadedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uploadedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select document_attachment_id, company_id, document_id, file_url, file_name, file_type, file_size_bytes, media_kind, status, uploaded_by, uploaded_at from document_attachments where document_attachment_id = #{documentAttachmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
